DROP USER (SELECT username FROM users WHERE user_id = 5) CASCADE;
DROP USER (SELECT username FROM user_profiles WHERE email = 'example@test.com') CASCADE;
DROP USER (SELECT username FROM user_accounts WHERE account_type IN ('premium', 'basic')) CASCADE;
DROP USER 'user1' WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM schemas WHERE owner = 'user1') CASCADE;
DROP USER 'user2' WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resources WHERE owner = 'user2') > 0 CASCADE;
